title: Index of every authorization run directory (navigation aid)
note: ADVISORY navigation index for an agentic reader. The NORMATIVE, record-verified chain lives in ../CONTRACTS/authorization-chain.json; do not treat this index as authority. Each run dir holds authorization-summary.json (the record), one packet file per seat, and the runner script.
